# meok-mcp-hardening-mcp

> MEOK MCP Hardening MCP — automated security red-team for any MCP server. Maps OWASP LLM Top 10 (2025) + 5 MCP-specific risks to a 0-100 hardening score with HMAC-signed reports. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- audit_server_json
- audit_tool_description
- check_destructive_surface
- check_supply_chain
- list_owasp_findings
- generate_hardened_template
- sign_security_report

## Install
```
pip install meok-mcp-hardening-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-mcp-hardening-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
